_phase16_profile_schema: Phase 16 adds three OPTIONAL fields to profile.json for report publishing:
report_repo:        full HTTPS URL of the docs repo (e.g. https://github.com/user/docs.git)
report_path_prefix: optional directory inside the repo (default: 'reports')
When report_repo is empty or unset, report push is skipped silently (audit still written).
The PAT for push auth lives in the profile .env as REPORT_REPO_TOKEN and is redacted by the Anthropic proxy.
See .planning/phases/16-result-channel/16-CONTEXT.md decisions D-01, D-02, D-08, D-14.
